page_content:
BEES609 Special Topics in Behavior, Ecology, Evolution and Systematics (1-6 Credits)

Lectures, experimental courses and other special instructions in topics appropriate for Behavior, Ecology, Evolution and Systematics (BEES) students.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

BEES708 Advanced Topics in Behavior, Ecology, Evolution, and Systematics (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, experimental courses, and other special instruction in various behavioral, ecology, evolution and systematics subjects.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

BEES799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) BEES898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) BEES899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
